title: I Asked My Love
content:
I asked my love: "Why do you make yourself so beautiful?"
                    "To please myself.
    I am the eye, the mirror, and the loveliness;
    The loved one and the lover and the love."

    From the Persian of Abu-Said (978-1062).
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator) delivers a powerful performance in "I Asked My Love"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
